tasks.description: Sidebar navigation component renders correctly (collapsed, expanded, badges)
steps: Sidebar renders with expandable sections (Basics, JIRA, FileCopy, Worktrees)
Collapsed sections show ▸ indicator, expanded show ▾
Focus indicator highlights selected section in bold/color
Validation badges appear for invalid sections (red)
Navigation via ↑↓ keys moves focus between sections
←→ keys collapse/expand sections correctly
Enter key selects section and transitions to form view

tasks.description: RootModel (ConfigModel) delegates to Navigator correctly
steps: ConfigModel initializes with Sidebar as initial model
Sidebar selection transitions to section form via Navigator.Push()
Save/Cancel from form returns to Sidebar via Navigator.Pop()
Config state persists across navigation transitions
Back button (Escape) properly pops navigation stack

tasks.description: gbm config command registered and launches TUI without errors
steps: Run 'gbm config' from CLI
TUI launches and displays Sidebar without panic or error
Terminal clears and shows fullscreen interface
Quit key (q) exits TUI cleanly

tasks.description: Basics section renders with default_branch and worktrees_dir fields
steps: Navigate to Basics section in sidebar
Form displays two TextInput fields: 'Default Branch' and 'Worktrees Dir'
Both fields are editable with cursor support
Current config values pre-populate the fields
Tab key moves between fields correctly

tasks.description: TextInput validators prevent invalid branch names and directory paths
steps: Enter invalid branch name (contains spaces or special chars): shows inline error
Enter invalid directory path: shows inline error
Enter valid branch name (alphanumeric, -, /): no error
Enter valid directory path: no error
Attempt to save with invalid fields: Save button disabled, error overlay shows

tasks.description: Save/discard flows work correctly from Basics section
steps: Edit Basics fields without saving
Press 's' or click Save: writes to .gbm/config.yaml and returns to Sidebar
Edit Basics fields again, press 'q': confirmation modal appears
Select 'Discard': changes lost, returns to Sidebar
Select 'Keep editing': stays in form with changes intact

tasks.description: JIRA enable/disable toggle works and shows/hides subsections
steps: Navigate to JIRA section
Toggle 'Enable JIRA' is visible and focusable
Toggle off: subsections (Server, Filters, Attachments, Markdown) are hidden
Toggle on: subsections become visible and navigable
Subsections only show fields when parent is enabled
Save config reflects enabled/disabled state in .gbm/config.yaml

tasks.description: JIRA subsections (Server, Filters, Attachments, Markdown) render with all fields editable
steps: JIRA enabled: expand Server subsection
Server shows: host (URL validator), username, api_token (masked) fields
Expand Filters subsection: status, priority fields visible
Expand Attachments: relevant JIRA fields visible and editable
Expand Markdown: relevant JIRA fields visible and editable
All fields accept input and update in-memory config
Validation shows errors for invalid JIRA URLs

tasks.description: FileCopy Rules table renders with add/edit/delete modals
steps: Navigate to FileCopy section
Rules table displays: source_worktree, files columns
Press 'a' to add rule: modal appears with form fields
Modal shows: source_worktree (selector), files (filepicker), auto settings
Press 'e' on rule: edit modal opens with pre-populated values
Press 'd' on rule: confirmation modal asks to delete
Confirm delete: rule removed from table and config
Press Escape in modal: modal closes without changes

tasks.description: Filepicker navigation works (↑↓, Enter to select, Escape to cancel)
steps: Open filepicker modal from FileCopy rule add/edit
↑↓ keys navigate file tree
→ key expands directories, ← collapses
Enter selects file and adds to files list
Escape cancels filepicker and returns to rule form
Multiple files can be selected per rule
Selected files display in rule summary

tasks.description: Worktrees table with add/edit/delete modals
steps: Navigate to Worktrees section
Table displays: name, branch, merge_into columns for each worktree
Press 'a' to add: modal appears with name, branch, merge_into, description fields
Press 'e' on row: edit modal opens with pre-populated values
Press 'd' on row: confirmation modal asks to delete
Confirm delete: worktree removed from table
New worktrees persist to config on save
Invalid worktree names are rejected with error message

tasks.description: Validation error overlays appear on invalid save attempts
steps: Enter invalid data in Basics or JIRA sections
Press 's' to save: overlay modal appears showing validation errors
Error list itemizes all validation failures
Press Escape or 'b' to go back: returns to form with errors highlighted
Fix errors and retry save: overlay disappears, save succeeds
Valid config saves without overlay confirmation

tasks.description: Dark and light themes both render correctly
steps: Run 'gbm config' with default theme
Verify readable text contrast in current terminal theme
Check sidebar has consistent focus/blur colors
Check form fields are visually distinguishable (focused vs blurred)
Test in both light and dark terminal backgrounds
Modal and error overlays visible in both themes

tasks.description: Help screen shows keyboard shortcuts via ? key
steps: Press '?' from any screen in TUI
Help overlay appears with full keyboard shortcut list
Help shows: navigation (↑↓←→), editing (s, a, e, d), form (Tab, Shift+Tab)
Help shows: quit (q, Ctrl+C), help (?), field-specific shortcuts
Press Escape to close help and return to previous screen
All shortcuts mentioned in PRD keyboard table are documented

tasks.description: All sections integrated in one ConfigModel with persistent state
steps: Start TUI and navigate Basics → JIRA → FileCopy → Worktrees
Edit values in each section without saving
Navigate back to previous sections: edits are still present
Reset button discards all in-memory changes and reloads from file
Config state persists across all navigation without loss

tasks.description: Storybook covers >80% of components/sections in multiple states
steps: Run storybook or story test command
Sidebar stories: collapsed state, expanded state, focused state, validation badges
Basics form stories: empty, populated, with validation errors
JIRA stories: toggle on/off, all subsections, nested structure
FileCopy stories: empty rules, rule with files, filepicker modal
Worktrees stories: empty table, populated table, add/edit/delete modals
Theme stories: light and dark themes for major components
Verify >80% of component states are covered

tasks.description: Unit tests >80% coverage for core ConfigModel and field validation
steps: Run 'go test ./pkg/tui/config -v'
All tests pass
ConfigModel tests: initialization, state transitions, validation
Sidebar tests: navigation, expand/collapse, focus management
Validator tests: branch name validation, directory path validation, JIRA URL validation
File copy tests: rule add/edit/delete, filepicker selection
Check coverage report: pkg/tui/config/* shows >80% coverage

tasks.description: E2E happy path test: load config → edit → save → verify file
steps: Test starts with valid .gbm/config.yaml
Run 'gbm config' in test environment
Navigate to Basics section
Edit default_branch to 'develop'
Navigate to JIRA section, enable JIRA, fill Server section
Press 's' to save
Verify TUI exits cleanly
Read .gbm/config.yaml file: verify edits persisted correctly
Verify original fields not overwritten

tasks.description: No breaking changes to existing commands
steps: Run 'gbm wt ls': displays worktrees as before
Run 'gbm wt add': wizard works as before
Run 'gbm wt delete': delete flow unchanged
Run 'gbm help': config command listed
All existing commands function without modification

tasks.description: CLI help and in-app documentation complete
steps: Run 'gbm config --help': shows command description and usage
Help text in TUI via '?' key shows all keyboard shortcuts
README section added on config TUI usage with examples
Troubleshooting guide documents common validation errors and fixes

patterns: Field interface: pkg/tui/field.go - All inputs implement same lifecycle
TextInput: pkg/tui/fields/textinput.go - Text input with validators
Table: pkg/tui/table.go - Data grid with cursor navigation
Command registration: cmd/service/root.go - Cobra command setup
nonGoals: Syntax highlighting or advanced YAML features
